name: Great Ajax Corp. 7.25% Convertible Senior Notes due 2024
summary: Great Ajax Corp. is a real estate investment trust (REIT) focused on acquiring, investing in, and managing a portfolio of mortgage loans secured by single-family residences and small balance commercial properties. The company seeks to generate attractive risk-adjusted returns for its investors through strategic asset selection and active management of its portfolio, operating primarily in the United States. Great Ajax Corp. is headquartered in Beaverton, Oregon.
